summary: Full site test of KiloLab marketplace completed. All public pages load correctly, navigation works, mobile responsive hamburger menu functions properly, PWA banner is disabled as expected, protected routes redirect to login/dashboard selection, and error boundary catches 404 errors gracefully.

minor.issue: 403 errors on some resources (likely Supabase auth-related, expected for preview env)

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with hero section, trust badge, CTA buttons
Navbar displays all navigation links (Tarifs, Trouver un Washer, FAQ, Contact)
Login link, Order link, and Become Washer link visible and functional
PWA Install Banner is NOT showing (disabled as expected)
Tarifs page navigation works - shows pricing cards (3€/kg Standard, 5€/kg Express)
FAQ page navigation works - shows accordion questions
Contact page navigation works - shows contact form with email, subject, message fields
Login page renders with email and password fields and submit button
Signup page renders with role selection (Client/Pressing), name, email, password fields
Become Washer page loads with recruitment content and CTA buttons
New Order page loads with formula selection (Standard, Express, Express 2H) and step indicators
Trouver un Washer page loads with search form and washer cards
Mobile responsive: hamburger menu button visible on mobile viewport
Mobile menu opens and closes on click
Protected routes (subscription, account-settings) redirect to /select-dashboard for unauthenticated users
404 page shows 'Page non trouvée' message with Retour and Accueil buttons
Error boundary works - no white screens on invalid routes
Footer visible with all sections (Services, Partenaires, Légal, Contact)
Final CTA section visible with 'Commander maintenant' and 'Devenir Washer' buttons
Language selector (French flag) visible in navbar
Theme toggle (moon icon) visible in navbar
Landing page scrolls through all sections without errors
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: PWA banner correctly disabled in App.tsx (commented out)
GOOD: ErrorBoundary wraps Suspense for graceful error handling
GOOD: All navigation links have data-testid attributes for testing
GOOD: Protected routes use PrivateRoute and ProtectedAdminRoute components
GOOD: OrdersMap component uses vanilla Leaflet (not react-leaflet) for better compatibility
GOOD: Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu works correctly
GOOD: i18n support with French as default language
NOTE: 403 errors on some API calls are expected in preview environment (Supabase auth)
test_credentials: Admin: akim.hachili@gmail.com, Client: sousouait59600@gmail.com (passwords managed by Supabase Auth - not available in test_credentials.md)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 completed full site test of all public pages. Key findings: 1) All navigation links work correctly, 2) PWA banner is disabled as expected, 3) Mobile responsive hamburger menu works, 4) Protected routes redirect to /select-dashboard for unauthenticated users, 5) 404 page shows proper error message, 6) OrdersMap uses vanilla Leaflet. Cannot test authenticated flows (client dashboard, washer dashboard, admin dashboard) because passwords are not available in test_credentials.md - they are managed by Supabase Auth. To test authenticated flows, need actual credentials from the user.
